hooks.command: echo 'Project state reload. CLAUDE.md holds the spec, rules, and agent delegation plan (already loaded). PROGRESS.md below is the authoritative record of what is done and what comes next — continue the autonomous loop from there.'; echo; echo '----- PROGRESS.md -----'; cat PROGRESS.md 2>/dev/null || echo '(PROGRESS.md not created yet — create it as the first step.)'; echo; echo '----- working tree -----'; git status --short 2>/dev/null
